findings.message: Habitable room "Kitchen" (kitchen) has no window wall.
findings.suggestion: change one exterior-facing wall on Kitchen to 'window'

findings.message: Wet rooms (kitchen/bath/laundry) do not share any walls; plumbing runs will be longer and more expensive.
findings.suggestion: group at least two wet rooms against a shared wet wall

findings.message: Bathroom "Bath" opens directly into a public room "LivingArea" (living). Prefer a hallway buffer.
findings.suggestion: route Bath through a hallway or foyer instead of directly off LivingArea
